evidence: "I LOVED THE WHOLE TRILOGY. GREAT ENTERTAINMENT."
"This was a very good story telling and wholesome entertainment for the whole family."
"The premise of this story is simple enough and perhaps even predictable, yet it has the elements of a great fable that can be retold over and over."
"If you want reality perhaps one of the many so called reality shows so popular today is your forte."
"A LITTLE SLOW IN THE START but by and by it draws you in and entertains as it assembles a team of fighters for a cause."
"I was mase to think of the Frost Giants fron nordic mythology as I watched this video and wonder if the tale could have been based on that."
"I think it was cast well and the setting of New Zealand was once again perfect carrying on the continuity of the former Tolkein movies."
"The anniversary edition is excellent, the images are sharp and the spooky black and white contrasts are presented crisp and clear."
"I love ERBdom and this was a great movie."
"I was not disappointed by what I saw. Its a great SciFi thriller even though a little vague in theory."
"Good performances and believable settings and costumes. AAA rating on this gem."
"The great group of actors are into their characters completely."
"I was delighted with a colorful and historic tale."
"This has to be my favorite sci fi movie. I have watched it again and again. I never get bored with it."

summary: The user has a strong preference for fantasy and sci-fi genres, enjoying family-friendly and comedic films. They appreciate high production quality and emotional resonance, often favoring simple narratives that are entertaining and engaging.
